taxonomy: Zosterophyllanthos phyllocardioides is a species of plant that belongs to the family Achariaceae. This family is a part of the order Malpighiales, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The order Malpighiales is further classified under the clade rosids, which is one of the two main groups of flowering plants. The clade rosids is part of the larger clade eudicots, which includes most modern flowering plants. The eudicots are a subgroup of the more general group called angiosperms, or flowering plants.
